title: ampelopsis sinica
intro: Ampelopsis sinica, also known as Yin-chai-huo, is a type of flowering plant native to China, belonging to the grape family (Vitaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation and relieve blood stasis, which is often used to treat conditions such as amenorrhea and postpartum hemorrhage. The health benefits of Ampelopsis sinica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ampelopsis sinica is often used in herbal preparations, such as decoctions and infusions, to promote menstrual regularity and overall well-being.
